dataset_label: Primary Human CD4+ T Cell Perturb-seq (Virtual Cell Models)
readout: 10x scRNA-seq, pseudobulk differential expression per guide/donor

fields.target_gene_symbol: HGNC-approved gene symbol targeted by the CRISPRi guide
fields.n_total_de_genes: Count of significantly differentially expressed genes vs. non-targeting control
fields.ontarget_effect_size: log2 fold-change of the target gene itself in perturbed vs. control cells
fields.donor_robustness_score: Fraction of donors (0-1) showing a concordant effect direction
fields.guide_robustness_score: Fraction of guides (0-1) per gene showing a concordant effect direction

caveats: Pseudobulk aggregation can mask single-cell heterogeneity within a condition.
CRISPRi knockdown is partial repression, not a true genetic knockout — residual target expression is possible.
Effect sizes are computed against a pooled non-targeting control guide set, not a gene-matched control.
